I believe there's a huge gap between the ease of use of Wallet of Satoshi and the self-custody of Phoenix. To minimize this gap, I created a new web app, a wallet that has the self-custody of Phoenix and is easy to use as Wallet of Satoshi.

projects.serviceDescription: Swap bitcoin for an MB WAY code and withdraw euros at any Multibanco ATM — or sell MB WAY codes for bitcoin. Settles in minutes, non-custodial, no KYC.

Payments, saving, investing, your account and card, and yes, Bitcoin, in one simple app that works the way you actually live. Everything the modern finance world offers, without needing five apps and a finance degree.
Um tabuleiro. Dois dinheiros. Um deles é real. Aprende a diferença entre satoshis verdadeiros e promessas de papel — a jogar.
Two chains fight for the next block reward. Engage in lightning-fast PvP duels in this revamp of the classic snake game.
Whether you're collecting donations, splitting bills, or selling services, PubPay lets you create payment requests that can be paid with just a few clicks.
